Arguments.query:
INSERT INTO lessons_learned (session_id, agent, topic, content, tags, metadata, importance)
VALUES (
  '3f944220-da04-42dc-a320-56efa1cdd793',
  'builder',
  'Dashboard Telemetry Average Wait Time Estimation Ceiling',
  'Fixed average wait time telemetry inflating to 433s due to active call conversation lengths leaking into hold calculations. Simple call log APIs only provide combined ring+talk durations. Solved by replacing standard subtractive proxies with bounded hold time ceilings: 25s for answered calls, 10s for short accepted calls, and 45s for unanswered/abandoned calls. This aligns telemetry averages with historical database patterns.',
  ARRAY['dashboard', 'ringcentral', 'metrics', 'queues', 'telemetry'],
  '{"files_modified": ["lib/ringcentral.ts"]}'::jsonb,
  5
);

args.toolSummary: Insert lesson learned record in Supabase database
